title: Kofi and the Magic Paintbrush
synopsis: When Kofi finds a magic paintbrush that brings his drawings to life, he feels scared at first. But with the help of his new magical friends, he discovers that being brave and kind makes the best adventures of all.

pages.text: Kofi found a sparkly paintbrush in his backyard. It glowed with rainbow colors! When he painted a purple butterfly, it fluttered right off the paper. Kofi felt scared and dropped the brush.

illustration.description: A young Black boy with curly hair and wide, surprised eyes holding a glowing rainbow paintbrush. A purple butterfly with shimmering wings flies off a piece of paper on the grass. Bright green backyard with flowers and a wooden fence in construction paper texture style.
illustration.alt: Kofi looking surprised as a purple butterfly flies from his drawing

pages.text: The butterfly landed gently on Kofi's nose. 'Don't be scared,' she said in a tiny, sweet voice. 'I'm Maya! You have a magic paintbrush. We can be friends!'

illustration.description: Close-up of Kofi's face with the purple butterfly perched on his nose, both smiling warmly. Kofi's expression has changed from scared to curious and happy. Soft yellow sunlight filters through green leaves in the background with textured, paper-like quality.
illustration.alt: Kofi smiling as butterfly Maya sits on his nose

pages.text: Kofi felt brave now. He picked up the magical brush and painted a red bird and a blue fish. They came to life too! 'Hello!' chirped Rio the bird. 'Hi there!' bubbled Finn the fish in his water bowl.

illustration.description: Kofi kneeling on grass, painting confidently with the magic brush. A red cardinal with friendly eyes perches nearby while a cheerful blue fish swims in a glass bowl. All characters have big, expressive smiles in bright cartoon style with bold primary colors.
illustration.alt: Kofi painting while his new friends Rio the bird and Finn the fish greet him

pages.text: The next day, Kofi felt sad because he couldn't reach his kite stuck in a tall tree. Maya, Rio, and Finn wanted to help their friend feel happy again.

illustration.description: Kofi standing under a large oak tree looking up sadly at his colorful kite tangled in high branches. Maya the butterfly, Rio the red bird, and Finn the fish in his portable bowl gather around Kofi with concerned, caring expressions. Warm afternoon lighting with textured tree bark and leaves.
illustration.alt: Sad Kofi looking up at his stuck kite while his magical friends gather to help

pages.text: Rio flew high and untangled the kite strings with his beak. Maya guided it down gently with her wings. Finn cheered from his bowl! Kofi felt so happy to have such good friends.

illustration.description: Rio the red bird flying near tree branches carefully untangling kite strings while Maya the purple butterfly hovers below guiding the colorful kite downward. Kofi reaches up with joy while Finn splashes excitedly in his bowl. Celebration mood with bright blue sky and green foliage.
illustration.alt: Rio and Maya working together to rescue Kofi's kite while everyone cheers

pages.text: From that day on, Kofi and his magical friends played together every day. When someone felt scared, sad, or needed help, they were always there for each other. The magic paintbrush had given Kofi the best gift of all - true friendship!

illustration.description: Kofi running happily through a sunny meadow with his kite soaring above. Maya flutters alongside, Rio flies in loops around the kite string, and Kofi carries Finn's bowl carefully. All friends have huge smiles in a joyful scene with rainbow colors, fluffy white clouds, and textured grass in construction paper style.
illustration.alt: Kofi and all his magical friends playing together happily in a sunny meadow

metadata.illustrationStyle: Bright, cheerful cartoon style with expressive faces. Bold primary colors. Rounded, friendly shapes. Slightly textured backgrounds like construction paper.

questions.question: How did Kofi feel when the butterfly first came to life?
questions.explanation: Kofi felt scared when the butterfly first came to life and dropped the paintbrush!

questions.question: What was the butterfly's name?
questions.explanation: The purple butterfly's name was Maya, and she was very kind to Kofi.

questions.question: Why did Kofi feel sad the next day?
choices: His kite was stuck in a tree
questions.explanation: Kofi felt sad because his kite was stuck high in a tree and he couldn't reach it.

questions.question: Who helped get the kite down?
questions.explanation: Rio untangled the kite strings and Maya guided it down gently - they worked together!

pages.title: Complete the Story
pages.text: Kofi found a _____ paintbrush that could bring drawings to _____. When he painted a purple _____, it flew right off the paper!

pages.title: Friends Help Each Other
pages.text: When Kofi's kite got _____ in the tree, his friends wanted to help. Rio the _____ flew up high while Maya the butterfly helped guide it down.
